appflow.flow.Description.Docs: A user-entered description of the flow.

appflow.flow.DestinationFlowConfigList.Docs: The configuration that controls how Amazon AppFlow places data in the destination connector.

appflow.flow.FlowName.Docs: The specified name of the flow. Spaces are not allowed. Use underscores (_) or hyphens (-) only.

appflow.flow.KMSArn.Docs: The ARN (Amazon Resource Name) of the Key Management Service (KMS) key you provide for encryption. This is required if you do not want to use the Amazon AppFlow-managed KMS key. If you don't provide anything here, Amazon AppFlow uses the Amazon AppFlow-managed KMS key.

appflow.flow.SourceFlowConfig.Docs: Contains information about the configuration of the source connector used in the flow.

appflow.flow.Tags.Docs: The tags used to organize, track, or control access for your flow.

appflow.flow.Tasks.Docs: A list of tasks that Amazon AppFlow performs while transferring the data in the flow run.

appflow.flow.TriggerConfig.Docs: The trigger settings that determine how and when Amazon AppFlow runs the specified flow.
